description: Show this command catalog. Add a word to filter, like groundwork-help git or groundwork-help update.
Fuzzy-pick a command from the catalog with fzf; prints it and copies it to the clipboard when possible.
Pull and apply Groundwork, then visibly update Homebrew packages/casks, mise-managed tools such as Node LTS, and latest-track AI tools.
Preview dotfile changes before applying them to your home directory.
Apply the source repo to your home directory.

Open a shell in the Groundwork source repo.
Restore the first-run backup of managed files and macOS defaults.
Scaffold AGENTS.md, agent folders, editor settings, and .gitignore for a new repo.
Scaffold a private agent-maintained knowledge wiki with raw/wiki layers and Obsidian setup.
Copy selected files or folders to the clipboard with path headers and contents for AI review.
Install the Groundwork-managed Obsidian plugin set into a vault.
Sign in to GitHub for gh and HTTPS Git operations.
Install gh as Git's HTTPS credential helper.
List files with details, hidden files, Git status, and directories first.

Tree view, three levels deep, when lt is not enough.
Open lazygit.
Open Neovim.
Use bat for syntax-highlighted file viewing.
Jump to a frecent folder with zoxide.

Fuzzy-pick files with a bat preview and insert the chosen paths into the current command.
Create a folder, including parent folders if needed.

Open the current folder in Finder.
Search file contents quickly. Lowercase searches are case-insensitive by default.
Search hidden and gitignored files too, while still skipping .git internals.
Search with ripgrep, fuzzy-pick a result, preview it with bat, and open it in the editor.
Find files by name quickly.

Run Atuin's opt-in English-to-shell assistant after setup.

Open a macOS app from the shell.

Upgrade globally managed mise tools, including floating baselines such as Node LTS. Takes effect at your next prompt, even in already-open terminals.
Package manager installed through mise for JavaScript projects.
Python installed and versioned by mise; avoid relying on macOS system Python.
Fast Python package, project, script, tool, and virtualenv manager.
